column_alignment.rule: Alignment must be semantic — it helps the eye compare values instantly.

patterns.reason: Decimal points align, enabling instant comparison
Currency symbol + decimal alignment. Use tabular-nums font variant.
Same as numbers — comparison by decimal position
Small visual element, centering reduces dead space
Row actions always right-aligned (reading endpoint = decision point)

sorting.visual: Sort indicator: ↑↓ icon next to column header. Active sort: accent color, filled arrow direction.
sorting.default_state: Both arrows visible but dimmed = sortable but not currently sorted
sorting.active_state: One arrow filled in accent color = currently sorted by this column in this direction
sorting.rule: Default sort should be the most natural (date desc for logs, name asc for lists). State survives pagination.

row_selection.pattern: Checkbox in first column. Header checkbox = select/deselect all on current page.
row_selection.indeterminate_header: When some-but-not-all rows on current page are selected: header checkbox is aria-checked='mixed'
row_selection.bulk_actions: Appear in a sticky bar above the table when ≥1 row is selected. Bar shows selected count + bulk action buttons.
row_selection.rule: NEVER hide primary row actions behind selection. Selection is for bulk — single-row actions stay visible in the row.

patterns.name: Classic pagination
patterns.use: When users need to navigate to a specific page or go back. Common in admin/data tables.
patterns.rule: Show max 7 page numbers. Truncate with ellipsis beyond. Always show first and last page.

patterns.name: Load more button
patterns.use: When users scan sequentially and back-navigation is rare. Comments, activity feeds.
patterns.controls: Load more button at bottom of list
patterns.rule: Show how many more items will load: 'Load 20 more (140 remaining)'

patterns.name: Infinite scroll
patterns.use: When content is continuous and destination matters less than discovery. Social feeds, image galleries.
patterns.rule: Provide footer access — infinite scroll traps users above the footer. Fix: sticky 'Jump to footer' link.
patterns.accessibility: Announce loaded content count to screen readers with aria-live='polite'

pagination.page_size_selector: Common sizes: 10, 25, 50, 100. Default to 25. Position: bottom-left or top-right of table.
pagination.rule: Always show total count: 'Showing 26–50 of 234 items'

row_actions.visible_actions: For 1–2 actions: show always in row (icon buttons or text links)
row_actions.overflow_menu: For 3+ actions: use overflow menu (⋯ or ⋮) that appears on row hover
row_actions.destructive_placement: Destructive action must be at the bottom of overflow menu, separated by a divider, in danger color
row_actions.hover_reveal: Actions can be invisible by default and reveal on row hover. Must also appear on row keyboard focus.
row_actions.rule: Never use hover-only actions without a keyboard-accessible equivalent

modes.use: Default for mixed content with avatars/tags
Power users, admin tools, financial data — many rows needed

density.rule: Offer density control for data-heavy tools. Default to comfortable for consumer products, default for B2B, compact only on explicit user preference.

styling_rules: Header row: bg-subtle (slightly different from body rows), font-medium or font-semibold, text-secondary
Body rows: alternating zebra striping OR hover highlight — NEVER both
Hover row: bg-subtle (2px brighter than row bg)
Sticky header: position:sticky top-0 z-[200] with box-shadow-sm (simulates separation from content)
Sticky first column: position:sticky left-0 with right-edge box-shadow to indicate overflow
accessibility: Static tables: role='table' (or native <table>), thead/tbody/th/td with scope='col'
Interactive tables: role='grid' — allows arrow key navigation
Table must have accessible name: aria-label or aria-labelledby pointing to a caption or heading
